parties.name: CLEE II, WILLIAM GEORGE 1919 ROSE LANE PLEASANT HILL, CA 94523

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Clee II in Propria Persona. Emma Hill Clee (Wife of William Clee I) in Propria Persona. William Clee III in Propria Persona.

Mr. Clee II explained that he originally purchased the property (20 acres), that he transferred title to his Parents in joint tenancy, and that when the Mother died the Father added him back on title as tenant in common. Ms. Clee stated that the property belonged to Mr. Clee II and her Husband, that Mr. Clee II is the owner, that she married Mr. Clee I in 2001 and that she is not claiming any of this property. Mr. Clee III stated that the last deed was in 2002, and that notice and the copy of the deed is attached to the filed document. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
